title: Junior Frontend Developer at IBM India

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at IBM India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? IBM India in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IBM India:
IBM India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India!
